title: Pi Gondolin Workspace Configuration
description: Configuration for additional Gondolin VM mounts and explicit host-side commands.

$schema.description: Optional JSON schema URL for editor validation.

mounts.description: Additional host directories to mount into the Gondolin VM. /workspace is mounted automatically and must not be configured here.

oneOf.description: Object map of host paths to guest mount paths.

hostCommands.description: Explicit commands that may run on the host outside the Gondolin VM/container.

localCommands.description: Alias for hostCommands. Prefer hostCommands for new configs.

outsideVmCommands.description: Alias for hostCommands. Prefer hostCommands for new configs.

absoluteGuestPath.description: Absolute POSIX path inside the VM. /workspace is reserved and mounted automatically.

hostPath.description: Host path. May be absolute, start with ~/, or be relative to the project root.

guestPath.description: Backward-compatible alias for mountPath. Prefer mountPath.

command.description: Command or command prefix to run on the host.

match.description: name: first shell word, prefix: command starts with this value, exact: full command equals this value.
